feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unkown numbers in query's
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone explain to me what the following numbers are doing and where they are coming from?

$[$38.44.0]

$[$20.0.0]

$38.44.0

This is the full query:

 

SELECT
CASE $[$38.44.0]
WHEN '' THEN (SELECT DISTINCT(T0.[WareHouse])
FROM OUDG T0
WHERE T0.[SalePerson] = $[$20.0.0])

ELSE (SELECT T1.[WhsCode]
FROM ORDR T0 INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE T0.[DocNum] = $[$38.44.0] AND T1.[LineNum] = $[$38.46.0])
END

entry.title: Not able to login SAP
entry.content:
Hello Community,
When trying to login to SAP ( SQL Environment ), system is generating this message and not showing any company in the company list.

 

What is the possible reason for this ?

entry.title: SYSTEM VARIABLES IN PLD
entry.content:
Good afternoon Experts,

We have the following scenario: we are trying to add the field OJDT.NUMBER from the Journal Entry module to the PLD "INVENTORY POSTING LIST" in the "REPETITIVE AREA."

However, when we add it, the system does not display anything in the repetitive area. We have searched through SAP Notes and SAP Help for any information, but we have not found any relationship or relevant information.

We considered using System Variable 78 (Transaction Number), which appears in the native PLD "TRANSACTION JOURNAL," but it also does not appear when added.

Our query is as follows:

  • Is it possible to add this field to the PLD "INVENTORY POSTING LIST" in the "REPETITIVE AREA"?
  • Or is there some kind of restriction?

SAP Business One

entry.title: single PO item multiple AP Invoices
entry.content:
Hi All

How to trace and list in Query a single item in PO with 10 Quantities copied to multiple AP Invoices with only one most recent Target Document Entry Number displayed in Target Key Reference?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: he database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be c
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please help me resoving this error in SAP B1

All of my clients is having a problem with SAP Business One.

The message "The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be closed,Do you want to continue adding the user-defined field"  When they click "Ok", the message is displayed endlessly. The only way is to interrupt SAP Business One through the task manager.

Most of the time the message appears when there is a period of inactivity on the PC or network interruption .

The perform data check option is not enabled on the database.

They are on SAP Business One (SQL Server), Version 10 FP 2208 

Is someone facing the same problem? Do you have any ideas to help me solve this problem please?

entry.title: The description field does not display any content.
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

I have created a New DB Throw Solution packager  and my version is 10  FB 2111

but after DB working I face an issue regarding the Description field in the  Production Order and Bill of Material (BoM) fields within our SAP system. Specifically, the Description field does not display any content

Although it appears on other screens Like PO,SO, ....etc

also, I run Query for WOR1 with No Result Also 

Can anyone help me to solve this issue 

I attached a screenshot of the issue ..

Regards

entry.title: Al abrir una cotización, pedido o factura hay que actualizar
entry.content:
Tengo problema que se ha suscitado de un par de días para acá, cuando abro un documento de venta (cotización, pedido o factura se habilita el botón de actualizar). Si actualizo, avanzo de documento y retrocedo, nuevamente se habilita

Pasos que realicé y el problema persiste

1- Eliminé todas las búsquedas formateadas

2- Comenté el transaction notification

3- Restauré una base anterior y el problema no pasaba

entry.title: Journal entry impact (Finance impact) manually close Delivery note SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear team,

Without creating A/R Invoice , If user can close the direct Delivery note then what is the impact on stock side and finance side? 

what is other best way to close this kind of old dated delivery ? Can we recon. OR close is best?

SAP Business One , SAP B1

 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re-Allocated Issue at Good Inventory transfer request
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

In inventory transfer request, when a batch number is allocated and it is sent for approval, the batch number is automatically de-allocated
 
 Following is the issue reproduce steps.

  1. Add Inventory Transfer Request Document

    • Assign the batch (Batch.2).

  2. Approval by Approver

    • The approver will review and approve the document.

  3. Draft Review by Originator

    • The originator will reopen the draft and add a remark.

  4. Second Approval by Approver

    • The approver will approve the document again.

  5. Draft Update by Originator

    • The originator will update the draft.

  6. Issue: Check Batch Allocation

    • After the draft is updated, the batch allocation is getting removed.
 
 
 
Regards,
Krishna Varma

entry.title: SO in SAP B1 - 'Cannot select serial numbers; fractional quantity exists in row 10' error
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I am creating a Sales order and its showing me the error 'Cannot select serial numbers; fractional quantity exists in row 10'.

The item in row 10 is a newly created item, I followed the same procedure as all the other created items, but this is the first time I have an error related to fractional quantity. 

Hope anyone can help me understand what is this issue and how to solve it.

entry.title: SAP Business One Acces browser dispatcher with MS Outlok?
entry.content:
Hello experts
I would like to know if Acces Web dispatcher from SAP Business One can work with Microsoft Outlook.
If it does
please help me to set up MS Outlook with Acces web Dispatcher from SAP Business One 10.
Thanks a lot!

entry.title: approval template did not affect some users
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our client using SAP B1 version 9 having a problem with their approval. 

Approval condition is if the customers Sales Order is over their limit then the document will go through approval process. When logged in with marketing user, sales order document that over credit limit did not go through approval process. If i tried creating SO using manager account, the document successfully go through the approval process. 

Any settings or authorization that i need to check?

entry.title: JE Taxable Amounts Mismatch with Tax Reports Taxable Amounts Decimal
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
One of my client facing issue related to Debit(FC) amount in JE which is not matched with Taxable Amount (FC) in SAP B1 standard Tax Reports.

Please see below screenshot for your reference :-

Can anyone please help in this? Why this is showing decimal amount difference?

Thanks & Regards,

Shrikant

entry.title: How to delete data from ORCM
entry.content:
Hello,
how is it possible to delete the MRP data of the ORCM table for removed scenarios?
I created a scenario, ran the MRP, and checked the number of articles in the rows of the ORCM table for the new scenario. (818 rows)
Then I ran the same scenario with only one item... there were still 7 lines in the recommendation.
However, the ORCM table still showed 818 rows.
Then I removed the scenario via the SAP menue "remove".
The table still shows the 818 rows even with the scenario removed, although the message came up in SAP that all associated recommendations would be deleted.
Today we have 
45.208.400 Rows 
8.759.360 KB
in ORCM


Can anyone help?

Thanks

Greetings
Markus

entry.title: Changing the item type from inventory item to non inventory item
entry.content:
Hello Community , 

I made an item and performed purchase order and by mistake performed GRPO for that same item as well , this item should have been marked as non inventory item, I cancelled the GRPO document and made the inventory 0 again but cannot make the item as non inventory item, SAP is not allowing me.

Is there any way to to make the same item as non inventory item?

entry.title: How to Monitor the Impact of Assigning a Consignment Business Partner to a Warehouse in SAP Business
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I've configured a warehouse in SAP Business One and assigned a Business Partner (BP) as the Consignment Business Partner. I'm seeking guidance on how to observe and analyze the effects of this assignment within my documents and reports. Specifically:

  • Which documents or transactions reflect the association between the warehouse and the consignment BP?
  • Are there particular reports that highlight inventory levels, movements, or financial impacts related to consignment stock?
  • How can I ensure that the consignment stock is accurately tracked and reported in the system?
  • Does selecting a Consignment Business Partner for a warehouse automatically populate any fields in related transactions or documents?

Any insights or recommendations on effectively monitoring and managing consignment stock with this setup would be greatly appreciated.

and is the business partner field related to consignment business partner? if yes how does it work ?

Thank you!

entry.title: In SAP Business One, how can I check how many items have been issued against my Employee Code?
Something wrong on RDR10 LineNum?
entry.content:
Hello guys,
here again for your support, please.

I can't understand why in the draft A/R Invoice posted in the image below, I can see a correct sequence of the Test Lines, but in the table RDR10 it seems wrong, also if I try to print the draft CR layout. 

As you can see, in the table RDR1 I've 9 records (VisOrder from 0 to 😎 and LineNum between 1 and 11 (Line 0, 2 and 7 have been deleted), but in the RDR10 LineSeq and AftLineNum are between 0 and 8, including 2 and 7...

The result is that if I'll print the CR layout, the last text line is printed under the 8 LineNum which is wrong.

May be a bug?
It's the first case occurred and probably it depends by having modified the draft Invoice deleting LineNum 0, 2 and 7 and contextually inserting the new lines  9, 10 and 11 before saving (this did not update the RDR10) but I can't understand why in the GUI the sequence of the text lines is correct if in the table not.

SBO FP 2402 (10.00.240) MSSQL
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Using default connection string in production SAP B1
entry.content:
Greetings everyone

There is an extension which is running and is registered in SAP Business One Client. I would like it to call a second extension to run in parallel but without registering it. We plan on using the default connection string so we would not consume the one that comes on the arguments when an Extension is started through the Add-On Manager (or started automatically). However, is it possible to use the default connection string on any environment without issues? I am aware that the original purpose of that one is to use it for development environments, but it would really solve an immediate issue to have an additional connection (for the second extension) to the company which is being used in the SAP Business One Client (The desktop application).

Considering that everything is running in .NET Framework.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Crystal Reports Error Vendor Code 916
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, we are using the Payment Engine to do EFT/ACH.  In one company it works fine and I have a Crystal Report that the Electronic File Manager uses to create the payment file.  In another company/DB, I needed to add a table to the crystal report.  The Crystal Report Preview works fine, the EFM preview works fine.  As soon as I implement this EFM into the file format under Payment Means, and run a Payment Wizard to generate a payment file, I get an error saying Vendor Code 916.  Does anyone know what the fix for this should be?

Thanks in advance.
